category_title: Students with mild cerebral palsy developing self-evaluation and social bravery
scenario_title: Group discussion and goal setting in Chinese class
minimal_context: Nancy is participating in a group discussion in Chinese class to set her learning goals for the term.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's begin our group discussion for Chinese class. What learning goals are you setting for yourself?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I have to speak a bit louder, and try to ask people’s help to take notes.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What will you do if you encounter difficulties with the tasks?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: When I encounter difficulties, I become brave. When I get the tasks from the teachers, I will be responsible for finishing them on time.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: That is good. My advice is that you should also work on your typing so you don't feel nervous.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: My weakness is I do not like to listen to people’s advice.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's begin our group discussion for Chinese class. What learning goals are you setting for yourself?

STUDENT: I have to speak a bit louder, and try to ask people’s help to take notes.

TUTOR: What will you do if you encounter difficulties with the tasks?

STUDENT: When I encounter difficulties, I become brave. When I get the tasks from the teachers, I will be responsible for finishing them on time.

TUTOR: That is good. My advice is that you should also work on your typing so you don't feel nervous.

STUDENT: My weakness is I do not like to listen to people’s advice.

task.content: Participating in a group discussion and setting learning goals
task.learning_goal: improve speaking skills and collaborate with each other

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When receiving advice or feedback from others
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Does not like to listen to people's advice
related_quotes: My weakness is I do not like to listen to people’s advice .

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Identifies need to speak a bit louder and try to ask people's help to take notes
behavior_patterns.internal_state: I become brave; I will be responsible for finishing them on time
related_quotes: I have to speak a bit louder, and try to ask people’s help to take notes .
When I encounter difficulties, I become brave . When I get the tasks from the teachers, I will be responsible for finishing them on time .
